case_title: REZA ALHOSSEINI VS. GENERAL ASSEMBLY SPACE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-30-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF REZA ALHOSSEINI IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT GENERAL ASSEMBLY SPACE, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THE PARTIES HAVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT BUT IS REQUESTING A PROGRESS REPORT DATE TO ENSURE PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT CALLING, THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DENISE DE BELLEFUILLE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
